calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for Laurie Bernstein (Executor).

The Court stated that the only reason the matter is on calendar is because of the debate as to whether the petition for preliminary distribution is considered extraordinary or not. Ms. Navia presented oral argument/explained services provided to support her request for extraordinary fees. The Petition to Approve Waiver of Account/Final Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wu. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Continued To Jun-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Continued To May-14-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Authority To Enter Into Contingent Fee Agreement
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for and with Laurie Bernstein (Petitioner). Joseph Urbanski for Quan Sing Tu.

Ms. Navia addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
